=== MAIN TWEET ===
The best tools I give Codex are bespoke CLIs.

Codex is great at using tools when the tool can be expressed as a precise
command. A connector or MCP server is great for access. But sometimes the
source output is too big, too noisy, or too awkward to keep handing to
Codex raw. In those cases, a command with flags, stable JSON, predictable
errors, and a help screen works better.
